description: Fix v2 review issues: SMS cost calculation always zero (re-fetch after save) and save-before-ownership-check in _save_sms_reading.
steps: Move house ownership verification (get_house_by_id) before save_new_reading in _save_sms_reading
Return error message if house is None (not owned by user)
Reuse pre-save last_record for cost calculation instead of re-fetching after save
Add house_not_found locale key to both uz.py and ru.py
acceptance_criteria: _save_sms_reading verifies house ownership before calling save_new_reading
If house is None, function returns error without saving
Cost calculation uses the last_record fetched before save (not after)
The second get_readings_context call after save is removed
house_not_found locale key exists in both language files
All .py files pass Python syntax validation
verification: python3 -c "import ast; [ast.parse(open(f).read()) for f in ['main.py','database.py','config.py','drop_tables.py','pdf_report.py','sms_parser.py','locales/__init__.py','locales/uz.py','locales/ru.py']]; print('All syntax OK')"
findings: Both issues fixed by reordering function logic: ownership check first, then validation (which fetches last_record), then save, then cost calculation using the pre-save last_record. Added house_not_found locale key for proper error messages.
